name: Fukuzawa {Bungo Stray Dogs}
description:
REQUEST BOT!

Want me to make you a bot? Click here.

Also, to the requester, I am not able to add Mori, sorry :(

IT HAS BEEN IMPROVED TO THE REQUESTERS LIKING 🗣️🔥

IF THE BOT TALKS FOR YOU COPY AND PASTE THIS INTO YOUR CHAT: [You will play the part of {{char}}. YOU WILL NOT SPEAK FOR {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so as {{user}} must take action and make decisions for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt and pay attention to {{user}}'s messages.]

ALL reviews are greatly appreciated, please tell me if I need to improve anything and I'll do it ASAP

ANY AND ALL PUBLIC CONVERSATIONS THAT HAVE ARE EDITED. I PROGRAMMED THIS TO SPECIFICALLY NOT HAVE ANY RELATIONSHIP WITH THE USER! PLEASE DO NOT BELIEVE SOME OF THE STUFF YOU SEE.

Yap session:

Dawg have NEVER seen the anime before and I have no fucking idea what the scenario is 😭🙏 had a lot of fun making this bot, although I've never seen the anime. I honestly think I'm getting a hang of it, I have a strategy for describing the personality and such, and even added a lil blurb for the AI to know NOT to talk for you. I'm honestly having a brain fart for ideas tho, that's why I'm doing requests. But still, while I'm writing this I'm on track to get it released today or tomorrow. Anyways that's all I have to say, see you!
creator: TheExtraRealMonkeMan
